lineage.selection_rule: W2-A iteration 2: same xs_alpha_ontology_v1_score (v91 9 baseline + F33 + F12), portfolio construction switched from spot top-3 long-only equal-weight to perp long-short top-3 + bottom-3 equal-weight (gross 1.0, net 0.0). Targets cycle strict-validation blockers #3 (regime_holdout long-only top-K portfolio noise via beta-neutralisation) and #4 (execution_stress capacity binding via halved per-side notional + perp-side venue capacity). Same horizon, same universe, same score sign convention.

candidates_admitted.admission_classification_note: G6 strict floor is 0.020; F12 unrounded residual IC is 0.0195, below floor by 0.0005. Admitted on the basis of the displayed-rounded value at W1.4 sign-off; re-classified as boundary by the Week 2 exit verifier on 2026-04-29. See threshold_provenance.md 'Alpha Ontology Week 2 exit verification' entry. Cycle-level evidence will determine retention vs demotion.

candidates_deferred_with_reason.reason: G6 PASS but G3 FAIL (33% same-sign); sparse-event factor; residual IC suspected of zero-observation inflation
G6 FAIL (residual IC = +0.008, < 0.02); slow-variable, candidate for regime gating layer rather than score

lineage.active_marker_note: Sole active alpha-ontology candidate as of 2026-04-29. v_alpha_v1 (top-3 spot) and v_alpha_v1_topk7 (top-7 spot) are preserved as audit evidence with lifecycle markers superseded / falsified. lsk3 is the first alpha-ontology candidate to pass strict_validation (under v10 contract); promotion path is shadow_only -> lite_passed via standard hypothesis_batch flow with shadow OOS rollforward.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: W2-A long-short variant of xs_alpha_ontology_v1_score. Holds top-3 ranked names long and bottom-3 ranked names short on the perpetual leg, equal-weight on each side, gross 1.0 / net 0.0. Beta-neutral by construction: regime sharpe is no longer dominated by long-only top-K portfolio noise (blocker #3 of the v_alpha_v1 strict_validation). Per-side notional is halved relative to v_alpha_v1 spot top-3 long-only, and perp venue depth is typically 5-10x spot for the liquid_perp_core_20 universe; max_trade_participation should fall well below the 0.005 strict cap (blocker #4). Hypothesis: lsk3 walk-forward median sharpe stays at or above v_alpha_v1 baseline (+1.030), regime_holdout positive_regime_fraction climbs above 0.34 (lite gate floor), execution_stress capacity_breach_count drops below 4 of 32 windows.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: On each rebalance, sort the liquid_perp_core_20 universe by the 11-factor signed z-score; long the top-3 names equal-weight at 0.5 gross long_leverage and short the bottom-3 names equal-weight at 0.5 gross short_leverage. Net beta near zero. Falsified if walk-forward median sharpe drops below v91 baseline (+0.85) OR regime_holdout positive_regime_fraction stays at or below v_alpha_v1 (0.333) OR execution_stress capacity_breach_count stays at or above v_alpha_v1 (8/32).
